global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a robust, stocky body and a short, thick neck. It has a predominantly pale gray and white plumage with a slightly hooked bill. The wings are long and narrow, adapted for gliding over the ocean.

part_details.plumage: Pale gray on the upper parts and white on the underparts, smooth texture.
part_details.bill: Short, slightly hooked, pale yellow or gray.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed, gray on top and white underneath.
part_details.tail: Short and square, matching the gray and white plumage.

spatial_relations: The wings extend laterally from the body, long and narrow.
The short neck connects the head to the stocky body.
The tail is positioned at the rear, short and square.
